name: Ria Money Transfer - Universal Check Cashing
description_short: Ria Money Transfer is a global remittance provider offering international money transfers to 190+ countries through 600,000+ locations, with online, mobile app, in-person, and WhatsApp sending options.
description_long:
Ria Money Transfer has been operating for over 35 years as a trusted international money transfer service. The company specializes in helping people send money to family and friends worldwide, positioning itself as a remittance-focused financial service rather than a traditional check-cashing storefront. Their core business model centers on facilitating cross-border payments rather than cashing checks or issuing money orders.

Ria offers multiple ways to send money: online via their website, through their mobile app (iOS and Android), in person at physical agent locations, and via WhatsApp integration. Recipients can receive funds through bank deposit, cash pickup at 600,000+ locations, digital wallets, home delivery, or ATM withdrawal. The service operates in over 190 countries and territories, supports over 100 currencies, and advertises competitive exchange rates. They claim to have processed over a billion safe transfers and offer a 100% satisfaction guarantee.

Ria differentiates itself through their extensive agent network (600,000+ locations globally), multi-platform sending convenience (website, app, in-person, WhatsApp), established brand reputation spanning 35+ years, and high user ratings (4.9 stars on iOS, 4.5 on Trustpilot). They also emphasize speed, with transfers available "in seconds" and same-day delivery options. Additionally, Ria serves as an official sponsor of the Mexican National Team, reflecting their strong presence in Latin American remittance corridors.

While Ria positions itself as a consumer-friendly remittance service, the company is fundamentally a money transfer operator rather than a check-cashing business. The miscategorization as "check-cashing" is inaccurate—Ria does not advertise check-cashing services, money order issuance, or bill payment on their website. This is a global remittance company targeting international money senders, not a domestic financial services provider addressing check liquidity or cash access needs.
address: Universal Check Cashing, 7246 E Main St, Mesa, AZ 85207

company_info.headquarters: Universal Check Cashing, 7246 E Main St, Mesa, AZ 85207

pros: Extensive global network with 600,000+ pickup and send locations across 190+ countries
Multiple sending channels: online, mobile app, in-person, and WhatsApp integration for convenience
Supports 100+ currencies with competitive exchange rates displayed upfront
Fast transfer speeds, with same-day delivery available to many countries (e.g., Mexico by 1:45 PM)
Strong brand reputation with 35+ years of operating history and over 1 billion transfers processed
High user satisfaction ratings: 4.9/5 on iOS, 4.5/5 on Trustpilot with 234K+ reviews
100% satisfaction guarantee with no-hassle policy for customer protection
cons: Does not offer check-cashing or money order services despite miscategorization, limiting utility for those services
Transfer fees apply (minimum $1.99 USD shown in example), adding to overall transaction cost
Delivery time varies by country and delivery method, not instantaneous in all cases
Mobile app ratings slightly lower (4.8/5 on Google Play) suggest potential usability or reliability issues on Android
No information provided about verification requirements, minimum/maximum transfer limits beyond the Mexico example ($1-$29,999.99), or compliance disclosures
best_for: Immigrants and migrant workers sending regular remittances to family in Latin America, Africa, Asia, and Europe
International business professionals needing to move funds across borders quickly and reliably
Consumers seeking multi-currency transfers with competitive rates and flexible payout options
Users preferring digital-first money transfer with mobile app convenience or WhatsApp integration
diagnosis: Ria Money Transfer is best for individuals and families sending regular international remittances to relatives abroad across 190+ countries, prioritizing convenience, speed, and competitive rates over traditional financial services. The critical caveat is that this is NOT a check-cashing business—it is a remittance/money transfer operator, and customers needing actual check-cashing, money orders, or domestic bill payment services should look elsewhere.
services: Online money transfers via website with real-time exchange rate quotes
Mobile app-based money transfers for iOS and Android with transfer tracking
In-person cash payment at agent locations
Transfer tracking with real-time status updates
